# Samuele Poretti Portfolio

This site is the public portfolio of Samuele Poretti, a Computer Science student and developer based in Milan, Italy.

Primary URL: https://dreoxdev.it

## Important Pages

- Home and portfolio overview: https://dreoxdev.it/
- Home lab case study: https://dreoxdev.it/home-lab/
- CV PDF: https://dreoxdev.it/cv/samuele-poretti-cv.pdf
- Sitemap index: https://dreoxdev.it/sitemap-index.xml

## Content Summary

The site presents selected software projects, a technical timeline, a home lab infrastructure case study, contact links and a downloadable CV.

Key topics include Astro, Vue, TypeScript, Android development, Tauri desktop applications, Docker, Linux server administration, Cloudflare Tunnels, Traefik, Tailscale, local-first tools, automation workflows and AI/RAG experiments.

## Contact

- Email: samuele.poretti2003@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/DreoXDev
- Institutional GitHub: https://github.com/SPoretti
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/samueleporetti/
